audit_correction.action: Retain the visible-mass baseline and the single D_NN classifier-score result; remove historical optimized-score, add-MET, and duplicate alias branches.

blinding.data_scope: Run2012B/C TauPlusX rows in the localized public HiggsTauTauReduced mirror; 11.467/fb is retained as the Open Data normalization reference
blinding.phase5_audit_correction: Added same-sign QCD/fake background, multivariate input reweighting, and wider DY/Z normalization before promoting the calibrated score fit.

discovery_diagnostic.method: pyhf asymptotic q0 on observed full data

observed_fit.interpretation: Three-category classifier-score result with the same observed-data background constraints as the mass workspaces.

observed_upper_limit.method: pyhf asymptotic modified frequentist CLs with adaptive coarse scan

profile_mu_interval.method: Profile interval proxy for compact final-summary plotting: lower bound fixed at physical mu>=0 and upper bound set to the observed 95% CLs limit.

boosted.covariance_note: Diagonal validation covariance: data Poisson + MC/QCD sideband variances + 15% non-QCD normalization proxy.

vbf.covariance_note: Diagonal validation covariance: data Poisson + MC/QCD sideband variances + 15% non-QCD normalization proxy.

zero_jet.covariance_note: Diagonal validation covariance: data Poisson + MC/QCD sideband variances + 15% non-QCD normalization proxy.

fit_metadata.observable_bins: 20 uniform D_NN score bins in each of the VBF, boosted, and zero-jet channels
fit_metadata.profile_interval_policy: compact plotting proxy stored in observed_fit.profile_mu_interval

phase3_expected_result.caveat: Expected-only MC gain; severe input modelling caveats require Phase 4b validation before unqualified promotion.
phase3_expected_result.name: mva_xgboost_score_baseline_categories

sparse_bin_handling.method: common adjacent-bin merging across all fit categories using expected MC background only

training_summary.blinding: Trained only on signal/background MC in signal-region selected events. Collision data are not used in the signal-region classifier target or event weights.

training_weight.formula: nominal sigma*L/Ngen MC event weight times class-balance factor

boosted.covariance_note: Diagonal validation covariance: data Poisson + MC/QCD sideband variances + 15% non-QCD normalization proxy.

vbf.covariance_note: Diagonal validation covariance: data Poisson + MC/QCD sideband variances + 15% non-QCD normalization proxy.

zero_jet.covariance_note: Diagonal validation covariance: data Poisson + MC/QCD sideband variances + 15% non-QCD normalization proxy.

vbf_background_scale.application: central scale applied only to MC background samples in the VBF fit category
vbf_background_scale.data_scope: VBF-like rows with top-btag handle outside the low-mT signal region

wjets_high_mt_scale.data_scope: Run2012B/C TauPlusX rows in the localized public HiggsTauTauReduced mirror; 11.467/fb is retained as the Open Data normalization reference

normalization.localized_reduced_mirror_scope: local files have about one tenth of the Open Data record entries and are treated as reduced processing samples
normalization.mc_denominator_source: official CERN Open Data distribution.number_events from phase3 normalization_inputs.json

dnn_classifier_score_secondary.category_assignment: rederived VBF/boosted/zero-jet rules for control-region rows
limitations: No anti-isolated tau branch is available in the selected-event artifact.
The transfer factor is measured in the lowest observable bin and propagated globally.
The VBF MC-background control scale is applied before non-QCD subtraction.
QCD shape-statistical uncertainties are recorded for validation but not expanded into per-bin pyhf nuisances in the final workspace.
dnn_classifier_score_secondary.method: same-sign low-mT data minus non-QCD MC, transferred to opposite-sign signal candidates

transfer_sideband.description: lowest fitted-observable bin, chosen as the most signal-depleted control bin

visible_mass_qcd_primary.category_assignment: rederived VBF/boosted/zero-jet rules for control-region rows
limitations: No anti-isolated tau branch is available in the selected-event artifact.
